title: Record handoff50 tool8k thinking5 and web/media densify
prompt: Create reports/handoff50-tool8k-thinking5-webdesc.md with sections for Handoff 50, Tool 8k, Thinking 5, Swarm densify, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Handoff50 Tool8k Thinking5 Webdesc Contract

## Handoff 50
swarm handoff compaction ratio defaults to 0.50 so pre-swarm reclaim runs earlier under long sessions

## Tool 8k
tool result budgets default to 8k max chars with 250-char previews for denser context

## Thinking 5
live thinking glance defaults to a 5-line tail for transparent progress with less chrome

## Swarm densify
swarm expert body 650 / total 22k / inline 150 keep multi-expert handoffs lean

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/boundary/tool vitest + status-panel
